summary: Completed the ADR 0126 production activation from the rebased current-main `0.169.0` tree by reseeding the repo-managed Windmill scripts with the committed sync helper, verifying the live observation-loop wrapper, and proving that a production observation_finding run stops at RESOLVED when goal achievement is already true.

verification.check: Repo-managed Windmill script reseed from the rebased branch
verification.observed: Running `scripts/sync_windmill_seed_scripts.py` against the production Windmill API from source commit `a755423ed994c813d45bb9738c283c7d118c1dc5` synced 38 repo-managed scripts, including `f/lv3/platform_observation_loop` and `f/lv3/world_state/refresh_service_health`, with all items succeeding on the first attempt.

verification.check: Windmill runtime health after the closure-loop reseed
verification.observed: POST `http://100.64.0.1:8005/api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fwindmill_healthcheck` with probe `rebased-branch-check` returned HTTP `200` and `{"workspace":"lv3","job_id_present":true}` from the live worker.

POST `http://100.64.0.1:8005/api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fplatform_observation_loop` with a critical `windmill` service-health finding returned HTTP `200` and a structured closure-loop payload with one processed run in `ESCALATED_FOR_APPROVAL`, proving the Windmill wrapper now executes successfully on production.

verification.check: Goal-achievement termination on the live checkout
verification.observed: On `docker-runtime-lv3`, `sudo python3` from `/srv/proxmox_florin_server` started an `observation_finding` run with `goal_achieved: true` and returned `current_state: RESOLVED` with history `TRIAGED -> RESOLVED`.

notes: A direct `make live-apply-service service=windmill env=production` replay exposed a Windmill API race where script deletes and creates could disagree about path existence during reseed. The durable fix is the committed helper `scripts/sync_windmill_seed_scripts.py`, which is now wired into the Windmill runtime role.

The `world_state/refresh_service_health` Windmill job still did not return through `jobs/run_wait_result` during this turn, so the production termination proof used a live `observation_finding` run with explicit `goal_achieved: true` on the managed checkout instead of waiting on that wrapper path.
